turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi, I'm calling because I’m running low on my blood pressure medication, lisinopril, and I need a refill.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for watching.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, I’m ready to continue. Could you help me with that refill?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: to help with your refill. I'll need to create a devil patient profile for you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: My name is Jordan Miller.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: May I have your first and last name?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: and your date of birth is July 4th, 2000.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, my date of birth is March 14, 1992. I need a refill for my lisinopril prescription, please.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’ve only got

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How many days of lisinopril do you have left?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’ve got about two days left, so I really need that refill soon.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: If you are already out, just let me know.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I have your callback number as 951.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, let me confirm my number if you

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Let me double-check. My number is actually different. Would you like me to give it to you now?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Yes, please provide your correct phone number for follow-up.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, my correct phone number is 951-636-8881.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Could you please provide the name of the pharmacy you want to use for your medication?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: if you know the address, city, or any details like cross streets or nearby stores.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: That would help too.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: If you have their phone or fax number, please share that as well.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, the pharmacy is Green Valley Pharmacy on Main Street, near the corner with Oak Avenue. I don’t have their phone number on hand, but that’s the one I use.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Could you tell me the city and state where Green Valley Pharmacy is located?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: If you know the zip code, that would work too.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: this will help make sure we have the right location.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, it’s in Riverside, California, and the zip code is 92501.
